title: Jasper
overview: Long Yang is a strategist, martial artist, diplomat, and the first ever male paramour of all Chinese history. Living in the warring states period of ancient China–– a time of turbulence and uncertainty––he manages to gain the favor of Ji Yu, the King of Wei. A series of magical events bring the lord and his servant together as lovers, but dangerous conspiracies within the harem are lurking to destroy their romance……
